headlines.title: Israelis denounce Trump’s deal with Iran
headlines.summary: Israeli officials disparaged the peace deal and said Israel’s fight against Hezbollah in Lebanon would go on.

headlines.title: After news of Iran peace deal, Lebanese return home to assess wreckage
headlines.summary: Some war-weary residents displaced from the south found relative quiet, with guarded optimism that Trump will pressure Israel to adhere to a truce.

headlines.title: In Mideast and worldwide, cautious relief over deal to end damaging war
headlines.summary: Some world leaders hailed the deal, but many in the Middle East were cautious, saying important details remain to be settled and warning the accord could easily fall apart.

headlines.title: Britain announces sweeping ban on most social media for children under 16
headlines.summary: The U.K. prohibition is set to go further than those of other governments that are lining up against platforms engineered to maximize the time children spend on them

headlines.title: Russian attack kills at least five and damages historic monastery in Kyiv
headlines.summary: UNESCO, the U.N.’s world heritage agency, condemned the attack, which damaged the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra monastery. Russia said it bombed military targets.

headlines.title: South Sudan’s Jonglei: Who burned homes and silenced hospitals?
headlines.summary: Government and opposition forces accused of destruction in Jonglei amid burned villages and mass displacement.

headlines.title: Trump says Iran MoU signed electronically, Hormuz to open fully on Friday
headlines.summary: Backlash to US-Iran deal grows in Israel as Iranian vessels pass through Strait of Hormuz after US lifts naval blockade.

headlines.title: EU officially launches Ukraine and Moldova accession process
headlines.summary: Kyiv sees EU accession as a security guarantee and alignment with Western values as it defends against Russian invasion.

headlines.title: Hungarian MPs approve PM limits to block potential return of Orban
headlines.summary: The reform is one of the first introduced by PM Peter Magyar as he seeks to return Hungary to the EU mainstream.

headlines.title: Trump touts Iran deal and Ukraine ambition as he arrives at G7
headlines.summary: Amid G7 tensions, Trump says Iran agreement is a step towards peace in the Middle East and beyond.

headlines.title: Former ICE leader lands new job consulting on national security and defense
headlines.summary: Because of his former job, Todd Lyons cannot engage with the Department of Homeland Security for a year, per federal law.

headlines.title: Soccer Edition: Watch World Cup highlights from across the NPR Network
headlines.summary: The 2026 World Cup is playing out in communities across the country. Journalists from NPR and its member stations are in your city — capturing the excitement and asking the important questions.

headlines.title: As the U.S. turns 250, this historian has blunt advice: 'America has to grow up'
headlines.summary: In America, U.S.A., Princeton historian Eddie Glaude Jr. looks at the country through the lens of its previous anniversaries and centennials. "The divided soul of the nation is in full view," he says.

headlines.title: Former American businessman detained in Myanmar after alleged financial misconduct
headlines.summary: Adam Castillo, founder of AGS Myanmar, was detained Thursday at Yangon International Airport. The U.S. State Department is aware of a reported detention but hasn't commented further.

headlines.title: As Luigi Mangione's lawyers head to court, support grows for the accused 'vigilante'
headlines.summary: Luigi Mangione's legal team is back in court in New York City this week for a key pretrial hearing. He's accused of stalking and killing an insurance CEO. Donors have given $1.5 million to support his defense.

headlines.title: US embargo inflicts severe humanitarian toll on Cuba: media
headlines.summary: HAVANA - The US embargo against Cuba has caused incalculable humanitarian damage and become the main obstacle to the Caribbean country's social development, Cuban online news outlet Cubadebate said Monday.

headlines.title: G7 summit kicks off against backdrop of massive protest
headlines.summary: EVIAN, France - The Group of Seven (G7) summit kicked off on Monday in Evian, a town in eastern France, against the backdrop of massive demonstration.

headlines.title: Trump repeats wine tariff threat in row with France
headlines.summary: United States President Donald Trump has said he will "have no choice" but to impose a 100 percent tariff on wine imports from France unless the country does a U-turn on taxes imposed on big US technology companies, the third time he has made such a threat.

headlines.title: 8 feared dead in US Air Force B-52 bomber crash
headlines.summary: LOS ANGELES - A US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress carrying eight people crashed shortly after takeoff from Edwards Air Force Base in California's Mojave Desert on Monday, with no survivors reported, the base said.

headlines.title: US and Iran reach critical phase in deal
headlines.summary: With Iran and the United States reaching an agreement to end the war "permanently" on various fronts, the two have now taken a critical step toward a peaceful settlement and restoring safety in a vital maritime corridor, experts said.

headlines.title: SIT starts probe into Ram Mandir donations issue, reaches Ram temple complex
headlines.summary: Uttar Pradesh's SIT investigates Ram Mandir donation misappropriation, collecting documents at the temple complex as scrutiny intensifies.

headlines.title: Displaced Kashmiri Pandits seek structured engagement, genocide recognition, and property recovery
headlines.summary: Kashmiri Pandits seek genocide recognition, structured engagement, and property recovery during a heritage tour and international conference in Srinagar.

headlines.title: Centre warns of potential drone attacks on vital installations
headlines.summary: Union government warns of potential drone attacks on vital installations, prompting security agencies to implement counter-drone systems for protection.

headlines.title: Trinamool factions split on merger with NCPI
headlines.summary: Trinamool factions diverge on merging with NCPI, highlighting internal discord between Lok Sabha MPs and Bengal MLAs.

headlines.title: Priyank Kharge’s call for transparency in RSS is ‘driven by politics’: Mohan Bhagwat
headlines.summary: Mohan Bhagwat dismisses Priyank Kharge's transparency demands for RSS as politically motivated, citing absence of government funding.

headlines.title: Eight crew believed dead in California B-52 bomber crash, CNN reports
headlines.summary: Reuters: Eight crew believed dead in California B-52 bomber crash, CNN reports.

headlines.title: Asia markets temper Iran deal optimism, BOJ decision in view
headlines.summary: Reuters: Asia markets temper Iran deal optimism, BOJ decision in view.

headlines.title: Trump’s Iran accord offers exit from war — and fresh political risks
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump’s Iran accord offers exit from war — and fresh political risks.

headlines.title: Bank of Japan set to raise rates to 31-year high, vow further increases
headlines.summary: Reuters: Bank of Japan set to raise rates to 31-year high, vow further increases.

headlines.title: Trump's approval ticks up to 36% as price angst eases, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump's approval ticks up to 36% as price angst eases, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Microsoft turns to AWS as GitHub faces AI capacity crunch
hackerNews.summary: Microsoft is adding AWS capacity for GitHub after AI-driven usage strained the developer platform, exposing Azure constraints and the infrastructure cost of agentic coding.

hackerNews.title: A backdoor in a LinkedIn job offer
hackerNews.summary: A fake recruiter, a crypto repo, and a remote code execution payload hidden in a test file.

hackerNews.title: Banned Book Library in a Wi-Fi Smart Light Bulb
hackerNews.summary: OverviewA long while back I had an idea to hack a WiFi smart light bulb to do something more useful to me. Actually, I had a few different ideas of things to do with them. One of these ideas was to mo…

hackerNews.title: Iroh 1.0
hackerNews.summary: Iroh 1.0 is out. Now is the time to build.

hackerNews.title: Amazon Announces Multibillion-Dollar Data Center in Missouri
hackerNews.summary: Amazon Web Services is making a major push into Missouri with a multibillion-dollar investment in a new data center campus in Montgomery County, the company announced today.

hackerNews.title: TinyWind: A pixel pirate sailing game with real wind physics (380k+ kms sailed)
hackerNews.summary: Outsail the Royal Navy in your browser. Real sailing physics, 5-minute voyages, 30 historical treasures to recover. Free to play.

hackerNews.title: I Love the Computer
hackerNews.summary: An exploration of how I became a massive geek.

hackerNews.title: Why I email complete strangers
hackerNews.summary: The first time I emailed a stranger, I swear my cursor hovered over Send for a full five minutes.

hackerNews.title: Humanity isn't ready for the coming intelligence explosion
hackerNews.summary: economist.com: Humanity isn't ready for the coming intelligence explosion.

hackerNews.title: My Homelab AI Dev Platform
hackerNews.summary: Self-hosting OpenCode Web for GitOps style homelab changes.

summarySections.title: News and markets
sentences: Global headlines: Israelis denounce Trump’s deal with Iran (Israeli officials disparaged the peace deal and said Israel’s fight against Hezbollah in Lebanon would go on); After news of Iran peace deal, Lebanese return home to assess wreckage (Some war-weary residents displaced from the south found relative quiet, with guarded optimism that Trump will pressure Israel to adhere to a truce); and In Mideast and worldwide, cautious relief over deal to end damaging war (Some world leaders hailed the deal, but many in the Middle East were cautious, saying important details remain to be settled and warning the accord could easily fall apart).
Markets leaned lower, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes down; NASDAQ Composite up 3.07% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.
